Home | Forum

How do I appeal an IRS CP14 penalty?

I received a CP14 notice for $1,200. I want to understand the process for requesting penalty abatement. Has anyone gone through reasonable cause abatement successfully?

I paid my taxes late because of a medical emergency. I have documentation from my hospital stay that overlaps the filing deadline.

You should file Form 843 with your supporting documents. I did this last year and got my penalty removed within 60 days.

Call the IRS practitioner hotline first. Sometimes they can do a first-time abatement over the phone if your history is clean.

Medical emergency is one of the strongest reasonable cause arguments. Make sure you include the dates of your hospitalization.
